description: Microblog (Twitter/X-like) legacy aggregate targets: PUBLISHED AGGREGATE statistics only (no individual-level data). Research approximations with citations; tolerances are deliberately wide where the literature disagrees.

degree_tail_exponent.source: Follower-degree power-law exponent ~2.3-2.4 (Kwak, Lee, Park & Moon 2010, 'What is Twitter, a Social Network or a News Media?', WWW; Myers et al. 2014)

clustering.source: Low average clustering ~0.1 for the follower graph (Kwak et al. 2010)

diurnal_peak_hour.source: Microblog posting activity peaks around midday/early afternoon local time (circadian posting studies)

diurnal_trough_hour.source: Overnight trough ~03-05h local time (circadian posting studies)

posts_per_agent_day.source: Heavy-tailed; median user posts < 1x/day, mean higher (platform usage aggregates)
